review_title: High Performance and Availability with Percona Server for MySQL
description: Percona Server for MySQL is being used across our whole organization. We are running 50+ primary instances in our data center with DR replica's running on compute instances inside GCP in 2 different regions. Percona Server for MySQL solves our need for well-tested and stable MySQL instances with Percona doing additional testing to the upstream releases which gives that added level of stability that we need for the massive volumes of processing as well as the required performance in sharded instances.
author: Douglas D.
pros: Performance Stability Additional Variables for in-depth monitoring Easy migration path to Percona XtraDB Cluster Community Support Return on Investment: Percona Server for MySQL is open source with no hidden licensing costs which gives us huge savings on the high number of instances that are required on premise and in the cloud.
cons: No option for a distributed database yet in order to scale writes, but Percona Server for MySQL has exceptional performance when using sharding.

description: MySQL is a great product but when you use it in professionally you notice that some enterprise features are missing from the community version. Percona Server for MySQL includes all the enterprise features you could need by free, while being the same MySQL version you can find with the original vendor. This is a huge advantage, a true 100% drop-in replacement that has enterprise grade capabilities for no cost. If you are not using it, you should! Opinions expressed here are my own and not the opinions of my employer.
author: Francisco Miguel B.
pros: Percona Server for MySQL includes enterprise grade features like: - Encryption - Audit - Data Masking - AD/LDAP authentication - Physical backups
cons: New version take some time to come out, so you will always be one version behind Oracle. Not the best thing if you need to comply with security patches. For this you would need to complete this with Percona Support services, where they can help you with critical security backports if needed.

review_title: Percona Server for MySQL can beat old SQL servers.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: MYSQL server acts as root of the organization and it should be best comprising of various features like scalability, deployement, logging and compatibilty. Percona product provides all these factors in best form so that MYSQL server delivers extremely high-performance and reliability to more of the enterprises that drive businesses online. Personal experience, i have heard alot about percona server from my colleagues too and its worth trying because of its awesome features.
cons: In my opinion pricing can be the issue in percona server as it sounds lil bit expensive for me and will be getting charged if server is in use or not.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Anshika G.
pros: It is very easy to use and fully compatible. It enhances the performances and most important is its in the field of open source. There is no hidden cost of licensing. It gives us huge amount of savings on numerous perfoperformances.
cons: In somewhat what i donot like is pricing I think its might be little bit expensive.

review_title: A great alternative to stock Oracle MySQL
description: We're using it at our test and production servers, after migrating from MariaDB. Overall, it has been a very positive experience! :)
author: Thomas H.
pros: Seamless installation in relation to Oracle MySQL, good performance, better metrics when using it together with Percona Monitoring Tools.
cons: Release versions tend to be slightly lower than the Oracle ones. But that is expected, since Percona needs to patch and test it before releasing. So, not a big issue.

review_title: Percona is a great drop in replacement for MYSQL
description: I have been using percona software since past 7 years. Have deployed it in production setups and it works great. I have also used percona tools for monitoring . Percona xtrabackup and Percona xtradb cluster. They all work great. Its a good replacement for MySQL and offers enterprise level features.
author: hussain P.
pros: Its faster, easier to deploy, opensource. Percona offers several tools to diagnose MySQL issues.
cons: replication could be better like mongodb replicaset .

review_title: Percona Server scalibility is excellent for larger databases
description: Overall, I think Percona server is one of the best open-source server for MySQL!
author: Medline M.
pros: There are many things that I love about the Percona server. It provides additional counters and diagnostics to assess performance and also has a massive amount of scalability for clients with larger databases.
cons: After using this server on and off for several clients I have not run into any issues thus far.

description: I've utilized Percona Server with Percona's support for a number of years now. Both have been amazing to work with especially when it comes to tuning MySQL, Percona is a great resource to utilize.
author: Dawson G.
pros: I very much like the additional monitoring of Percona Server vs traditional MySQL. I've setup countless servers now with LDAP integration and audit logging without needing to pay for enterprise MySQL. Additionally the integrations for additional monitoring with Percona Monitoring and Management (PMM) has been extremely useful when attempting to evaluate overall health of my MySQL cluster.
cons: I don't actually have any cons per se. Percona Server is a drop in replacement for traditional MySQL which makes migrations easy.

review_title: Great MySQL database server from Percona
description: Percona provide great software. I woulld highly recommend them. Obviously look at what your needs are and check that you get all the functionality you require.
author: Harjit L.
pros: Very easy to install and and use. Well documented. Easy to upgrade. Enterprise standard. Paid support available if needed.
cons: WIthout paid support you have to google any issues so takes a bit longer to resolve.

review_title: Looking for a clustering solution and first found percona Xtradb cluster and feel in love.
description: It simplified database administration for my organization and helped us scale our applications to handle spikes in traffic.
author: Musa M.
pros: I like the fact that it was way easier than I thought to setup and migrate our databases over. Also, with automated backups and reports, I get a bird's eye view of our whole database infrastructure with respect to health, performance and resources.
cons: There were many components to choose from depending on what your needs are and that can daunting to a first time username.

review_title: Igor's review of Percona Server for MySQL
description: Very satisfied with using Percona Server for MYSQL and the features it allows as community version.
author: Igor D.
pros: The best about using Percona Server is that you get enterprise features in community version software. Many MySQL enterprise features like audit plugin, some global variables are free in Percona server. Even many improvements in things like flushing, compression, extended slow query logging exists.
cons: The software might have option to include monitoring agent that will be native in installing and configuring with PMM. A matter of enable_monitoring() function on the mysql engine instead of having to setup separate agents and users.

description: Definitely a huge speed improvement query and content delivery. To date no database corruptions on multiple websites served.
author: Craig T.
pros: Speed improvements Reliability Low maintenance
cons: Outdated documentation on website, such as "how to", sometimes quite old and sometimes longer relevant to current versions. Configurations on new versions tricky and becoming more complicated, especially for the "weekend warrior admin". Occasional server restarts with memory "leaks" but honestly these are likely not the server but poorly coded client side connections and calls (and/or hacking attempts on webserver)

description: Really good experience and as I already said, when you have the option is really easy to go with percona.
author: Sergio B.
pros: If you can choose which MySQL version you will use it's easy to go with Percona: Lot of really time-saving options for the admin and really good changes / patches incorporated on top of the std-issue MySQL.
cons: Not so easy to install depending on which distribution you are using.

author: Piotr G.
pros: Compatibility with vanilla MySql including software drivers and SDKs
cons: None so far. Overall the product is rock solid

author: Maximiliano O.
pros: This software allows you to generate high-performance applications in an accessible and productive way, thanks to its ease of use and scalability ensured with integration with kubernetes
cons: Lack of horizontal scalability and workbench bugs.

description: It was great so far, while using for office purpose
author: Udbhav S.
pros: I have used this software from a couple of months and to me it is quite easy to handle as compared to the other variants that are available in the market.
cons: The thing I like about the least is the marketing strategy around the third world countries

review_title: Percona Server makes my life as a DBA way easier
description: All the tweaks and performance improvements that come with Percona Server help my daily life as a DBA a lot. Percona Server offer data about important - but otherwise hidden - MySQL metrics (on a more granular scale).
author: Miklos S.
pros: - expose a lot of useful metrics to monitor - performance and stability improvements

author: Simon H.
pros: Ease of integration and improvement on features
cons: More comprehensive documentation would be good, especially around usage and tweaking

review_title: Customer experience and developer experience, both in one
author: Dushyant P.
pros: 1. Easy deployment - Initially used Postgres(Deployment - not very comfortable) 2. Easy to scale - even for a fresh graduate who hadn't put much thought into scalability while setting up the DB 3. Excellent, easy to understand logs - so that we know what's wrong and can fix it quicker
cons: It was somewhat challenging to be moving from Postgres to here, but I think it was as much our team's lack of expertise. Maybe some more documentation on migration from other DBs might help
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: One of the best MySql servers I have used
description: We have been using MariaDB and switched to Percona recently. We could see considerable performance improvements.
author: Jishnu V.
pros: 1. High availability 2. Great security 3. Enterprise-level features in the fully open-source version 4. Easy to install and use
cons: 1. UX can be improved 2. Needs better documentation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I choose Percona server because I trust Percona's developers and their community. If you have any questions, community is ready to help. And you will get more customized MySQL at hand. Stongly recommended.
author: Cihan T.
pros: Percona has its own development team on MySQL, Percona Server is more flexible, secure and have very usefull community than MySQL.
cons: Differences between MySQL and Percona Server might be defined more clearly to choose it. It has additional softwares that you might want to use, it might bundle with it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ashutosh D.
pros: It's is very easy to use , user-friendly ,simple uiux,easy design. Overall great experience.
cons: Bit expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Built some web applications using Percona Server. It's been great using this tool.
author: Babatunde K.
pros: I love the data storage management of Percona Server for MongoDB and MySQL being a lover of both SQL and NoSQL
cons: It'd be the price for me, being a junior developer with most experience working on perosmal projects.

review_title: Really good server. worth givin it a try. 8/10
author: Shalev S.
pros: I liked the simplicity, and the easy you can work with few languages on this.
cons: I liked least the fact you can store everything.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: My overall experience has been great till now. I am concered about the time as this software takes a lot of time to process the data.
author: Shreelaxmi G.
pros: For students like me, who arent earning and want to build a product, go for Percona because, The software it free, which makes it the best one amongst all the other available softwares in market.
cons: The least i like about this software is that, its time consuming. When things have to be done faster, this software takes time in processing the data.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
